theme_and_archetype.mood: Calm, botanical, premium, editorial, slow and elegant.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-widest uppercase font-light text-[#1F3D2E]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-wider uppercase font-light text-[#1F3D2E]

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous whitespace, slow elegant feel. Use p-12 to p-32 for section padding.
layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento-style organic grids. Use overlapping images and text to create depth. Asymmetrical layouts for editorial look.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Minimal glassmorphism. Prefer flat solid surfaces matching the background with extremely soft, diffuse shadows (e.g., shadow-[0_10px_40px_rgba(31,61,46,0.05)]) to mimic natural light.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Thin soft taupe (#9C9B91) dividers for sections, often paired with thin-line botanical flourishes.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1F3D2E] text-[#F5F1E8] hover:bg-[#16352A] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-lg px-8 py-3 tracking-widest uppercase text-sm
buttons.secondary: border border-[#C8A24B] text-[#1F3D2E] hover:bg-[#C8A24B] hover:text-[#F5F1E8] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-lg px-8 py-3 tracking-widest uppercase text-sm

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#F5F1E8]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#9C9B91]/30
header.announcement: bg-[#1F3D2E] text-[#F5F1E8] text-xs py-2 text-center tracking-widest uppercase

icons.usage: Thin gold botanical line icons (leaf, droplet, flower, sun) for benefit badges and commitments.

image_urls.description: Woman portrait with glowing natural skin, used for lifestyle/hero sections to establish the premium aesthetic.
Woman in white tank top, clean natural aesthetic for 'About' or 'Commitments' section.
Serum bottle on a stone pedestal. Represents Product 1 (e.g., Luminous Serum).
White cream in an open jar on a rock. Represents Product 2 (e.g., Renewal Cream).
Smooth grey and pink stones stacked. Used for story bands or decorative imagery.

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: lenis for smooth scrolling, giving weight to the premium feel.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Subtle fade and slow slide-up on entrance. framer-motion is recommended.
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Image zoom inside overflow-hidden wrappers (scale-105 duration-700). Text colors transition smoothly. No aggressive or bouncy animations.
motion_and_interactions.cart_drawer: Smooth right-to-left slide in with an overlay of bg-[#1F3D2E]/20.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='cart-drawer-close').

pages_instructions.home: Hero with product_1 on pedestal, thin gold benefit badges overlay. 'The Collection' section featuring product_1 and product_2. Brand-story band with story_botanical image. 'Our Commitments' row with lucide icons in gold. Testimonial carousel. Footer with newsletter.
pages_instructions.shop: Grid with category filter. Product cards with image hover effects.
pages_instructions.product_detail: 2-column layout on desktop. Left: Image gallery. Right: Title, rating, price, variants, quantity, Add to Cart & Buy Now buttons. Below: Tabbed sections (Benefits, Ingredients, How to Use), FAQ, Cross-sell.
pages_instructions.cart_and_checkout: Cart drawer accessible from header. Slide-out cart to have order summary and checkout button. Checkout pages should be cleanly integrated (Stripe hosted simulation).
pages_instructions.legal_and_contact: Text-heavy but highly readable. Max-width container, generous line-height, beautiful typography.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color hex codes provided.
Use Playfair Display for headings and Lato for body text.
Ensure all buttons use the primary/secondary configurations specified in components_strategy.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Rely exclusively on the 'media_and_assets.image_urls' provided.
For the e-commerce layout, maintain a mobile-first responsive design but ensure desktop feels like a high-end editorial spread.
If any icons are needed, use lucide-react with the styling: stroke-[#C8A24B] and strokeWidth={1.5}.
